(Note: potential for further 2026 NDSES remedy avoidance of ~US30m).

Min Term extension of existing contract 4 to 6 years post L1 last week. Fixed SV's to propose to be ascertained with support from Service business planner run post min term. Customer on board ("Pulling") and is waiting for RR proposal. Whilst we have a phase 1 and Phase 2 approach (Phase 1 not requiring additional support from outside of AM) we would seek to lock in resource in Q2 2025. Phase 1 amendment has now been shared with ANZ (10 July 2025) with initial feedback received from ANZ (24 July 2025). Action is on R-R to respond.

Restructure of ANA spare engine solution, utilising off-ramp of our Trent 1000 lease pool assets. Current spare engine holding is 15%, we are targeting uplifting closer to 20%, an opportunity for up to 8 used assets. Our lease pool engines are capitalised at cost, upside opportunity to transact at a premium to our balance sheet value. Any discount to market price will be offset against ANA's $33m non-contractual claim for Trent 1000 disruption in 2024. L2 rejected our simple approach of offering credits towards future spare engine purchases. Further due diligence required on both sides to align on the end solution, representing phase 2 of value co-creation with ANA.

Start expeceted in 2026 given Aegis contracting delay and Trent 1000 restructure priority
